title: Andesite Chests
description: Andesite Chests to match the Create mod aesthetic plus a nice fitting Crafting Table
body:
This small resource pack changes chests and trapped chests so they match with the aesthetic of the wonderful create mod. 
The crafting table has better colors and comes with a wrench.
 
Chest boats are also included!
Donkey and Mules included for 1.20 and higher.
 
You can use these textures in your packs, but give credit and maybe comment or message me if you do. It's nice to know that it is used. :)
